hero.title: Break Language Barriers
hero.description: Experience perfect translation in any environment, from small meetings to large conferences, with our industry-specific custom models.

strengths.title: Why Knoc?
strengths.description: We combine industry-specific translation models with intuitive usability to deliver seamless real-time communication.

technology.title: Translation Optimized for Your Industry
technology.description: Industry-specific AI models correct keywords, context, and speech recognition errors to deliver interpreter-level quality.

boost.title: Word & Context Boosting Model
boost.description: Comprehensively analyzes fields, sub-fields, and context across industries such as medicine, law, IT, and finance to boost keywords. Speech recognition errors are automatically corrected based on this analysis to deliver more accurate translations.

speed.title: Instant Complete Translation
speed.description: Unlike other services where subtitles keep flickering with corrections, Knoc remembers context like an interpreter and outputs complete sentences in meaningful units at once. We provide readable and stable subtitles.

autoDetect.title: Automatic Language Detection
autoDetect.description: The speaker's language is automatically detected. Participants can receive translations in their preferred language without any language survey.

coverage.title: Scalability for Global Communication
coverage.description: Supporting 101 languages, operating stably from 5-person meetings to events with over 1,000 attendees.

languages.title: 101 Languages Supported
languages.description: Supports 101 languages from major languages like Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese to minority languages. Automatically detects and translates without separate language settings.

scale.title: Flexible Scale Expansion
scale.description: Supports from 5-person small meetings to conferences with over 1,000 participants per room. With contract agreements, over 100 simultaneous sessions can be operated, with stable performance guaranteed in all environments.

accessibility.title: Anyone Can Start Easily
accessibility.description: Start immediately with just a Chrome browser without any installation. Accessible from all devices including mobile, tablet, and laptop, offered at reasonable pricing. If you'd like to view subtitles while working on other tasks, you can also install a lightweight overlay app.

easy.title: Easy to Use
easy.description: Use it directly in Chrome browser without any installation or language settings. Available on all devices including mobile and laptop.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Check out answers to common questions about our service

items.question: What is the difference between pay-as-you-go and contract?
items.answer: Pay As You Go is a prepaid credit system where you purchase credit packs before use. Custom plans are monthly subscriptions set up through consultation, suitable for large events or regular use.

items.question: Is there a minimum usage time?
items.answer: There is no minimum usage time for Pay As You Go. Custom plan terms are negotiable.

items.question: What are the payment methods?
items.answer: Pay As You Go uses prepaid credit packs. Custom plans are billed as monthly subscriptions.

items.question: Which plan should I choose?
items.answer: We recommend Pay As You Go for small meetings or simple tests, and Custom plans for institutions or companies with regular use.

items.question: What is automatic language recognition and switching?
items.answer: The system automatically recognizes whatever language the speaker uses, and participants can select their preferred language in the subtitle room to see translations in their own language. Multilingual communication is possible without prior language surveys.

items.question: What is the industry-specific boosting model?
items.answer: It is an AI model optimized for more accurate translation of specialized terminology in fields such as medicine, law, IT, and finance. Available with all plans.

items.question: What languages are supported?
items.answer: We support 101 languages including major languages like English, Chinese, Japanese, and Spanish. All languages support bidirectional translation and are continuously updated.

items.question: How accurate is the translation?
items.answer: We guarantee over 95% accuracy in general conversation and up to 95% accuracy in specialized fields with boosting models applied.

items.question: How many people can use it simultaneously?
items.answer: Pay As You Go allows up to 30 participants per room with 1 simultaneous room. Custom plans have participant limits and simultaneous rooms configured based on consultation.

items.question: Do I need to install a separate app?
items.answer: You can use it right away with just a Chrome browser. However, if you'd like to keep subtitles visible while working on other tasks, you can install our lightweight overlay app.

ctaBanner.title: Have more questions?

cover.title: Real-time
cover.description: Recognizes the speaker's voice and provides subtitles in each participant's language. No installation, no preparation needed.

whyNow.title: Multilingual Communication Is No Longer Optional
whyNow.lead: With globalization, remote work, and the expansion of multicultural society, the demand for multilingual communication is exploding. Yet most organizations still rely on outdated methods.

trends.unit: Foreign Residents in Korea · Over 5% of Population
trends.desc: For the first time, foreign residents have exceeded 5% of Korea's population, making multilingual support essential for both public and private sectors.
trends.source: Source: Ministry of Justice, Korea Immigration Service, 2025

trends.desc: 80% of remote-capable jobs have adopted hybrid or remote work, causing a surge in demand for multilingual video conferencing.
Korea ranks 4th worldwide in hosting international conferences with 1,000+ attendees. Global international conferences also grew 9% year-over-year.

oldItems: Spending millions on interpreter hiring every time
2-4 weeks preparation, no emergency response possible
Confidential information leak risk through external personnel
Communication blind spots due to unsupported minority languages
whyNow.calloutTitle: The difference is made by the speed of technology adoption.
whyNow.calloutDesc: Without interpreters, without installation, with just a browser — you can switch right now.

problems.title: Limitations of the Traditional Approach
problems.lead: Traditional methods relying on professional interpreters and interpretation equipment face limitations in cost, time, and security.

items.title: Interpretation Cost
items.desc: Professional simultaneous interpreters cost $800-1,600+ per day. Large events require budgets in the tens of thousands.

items.title: Preparation Burden
items.desc: Hiring interpreters, language coordination, equipment setup takes at least 2-4 weeks. Emergency situations cannot be addressed.

items.title: Terminology Limitations
items.desc: Risk of mistranslation by general interpreters in specialized fields like medical, legal, IT, finance, and government.

items.title: Cannot Scale
items.desc: Costs increase linearly as participant numbers grow. Forecasting is also difficult.

items.title: Security Risk
items.desc: There is always a risk of confidential meeting content being leaked through external interpreters.

problems.calloutTitle: What if all these problems could be solved with a single service?
problems.calloutDesc: No installation, no preparation, no external personnel — real-time translation in 101 languages with just a Chrome browser.

solution.title: Knoc — Real-time AI Translation Solution
solution.lead: Recognizes the speaker's voice in real time and translates subtitles into each participant's language. Works identically on mobile, tablet, and laptop — all you need is a Chrome browser.

tiles.title: Easy to Use
items: Runs instantly in Chrome without app installation
All devices: mobile, tablet, laptop
Automatic speaker language detection

items: Custom models for medical, legal, IT, finance, government
Simultaneous keyword + context boosting
Enhanced specialized translation accuracy with boosting

tiles.title: Massive Scalability
items: From 5-person meetings to 1,000+ conferences
Stable operation with 1,000+ concurrent users
24/7 uninterrupted service

tiles.title: Data Security
items: Data Zero Retention
GDPR Compliant
No data stored after session ends

cases.name: Kim O-hee, Manager
cases.org: Konkuk University International Exchange & Cooperation Team
cases.text: It showed great results during field trips. It was very easy to deliver announcements and run programs in real time. Even in environments where voices were hard to hear, students could check the content in their own language through the mobile subtitle room, which was especially useful.

cases.name: Kim O-won, Staff
cases.org: Konkuk University International Exchange & Cooperation Team
cases.text: It was very useful during orientations and briefings. These are occasions where important information needs to be delivered to many students, but since many don't understand English or Korean, we had to explain everything separately each time. After introducing Knoc, proceedings became much smoother, and student satisfaction was high. 83.2% of students responded that future adoption would be necessary.

sections.title: Personal Information Collected & Methods
sections.description: The Company collects the following personal information for service provision.

subsections.subtitle: During Service Use
subsections.content: Translation usage records, usage time, access logs, device information (browser type, OS), IP address. During real-time translation sessions, the speaker's voice data is temporarily processed but is immediately deleted upon session termination under the Data Zero Retention policy and is not stored separately.

subsections.subtitle: Upon Payment
subsections.content: Payment method information is processed through a third-party payment processor (Paddle). The Company only retains payment records (payment date, amount, plan type).

subsections.subtitle: Social Login (OAuth)
subsections.content: When logging in via Google or Microsoft accounts, we receive your email address, name (or display name), and profile image from the respective service.

subsections.subtitle: Upon Inquiry
subsections.content: Name, email, phone number, company/organization name, position, inquiry details

sections.title: Purpose of Collection and Use of Personal Information
sections.description: The Company uses collected personal information for the following purposes.
items: Account registration and management: Member identification, identity verification, service eligibility management
Service provision: AI real-time translation service delivery, usage time management, credit settlement
Billing: Credit purchase history management, subscription payment processing, usage history settlement
Customer support: Inquiry response, complaint handling, dispute resolution, notice delivery
Service improvement: Service usage statistical analysis, quality improvement, new feature development

sections.title: Retention and Use Period of Personal Information
sections.description: The Company destroys personal information without delay after the purpose of collection and use has been achieved. However, when retention is required under applicable laws, information is retained for the following periods.
items: Records of contracts or subscription withdrawal: 5 years (Electronic Commerce Act)
Records of payment and supply of goods: 5 years (Electronic Commerce Act)
Records of consumer complaints or dispute resolution: 3 years (Electronic Commerce Act)
Login records: 3 months (Protection of Communications Secrets Act)
sections.withdrawal: Upon account deletion, personal information is destroyed immediately. Information required to be retained under applicable laws is stored separately for the specified period and then destroyed. Voice data and translation data processed during real-time translation sessions are immediately destroyed upon session termination under the Data Zero Retention policy and are not stored or retained separately. Such data is not used for AI model training.

sections.title: Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
sections.description: The Company does not, in principle, provide users' personal information to third parties. However, the following cases are exceptions.
items: Payment processing: Minimum necessary information is provided to Paddle (payment processor) for payment processing.

AI service processing: Voice and text data are transmitted to external AI API providers for speech recognition and translation services. Such data is immediately destroyed after real-time processing and is not used for AI training.
Legal requests: When investigative agencies make requests in accordance with legally prescribed procedures for investigative purposes.
User consent: When the user has given prior consent.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.description: Users may exercise the following rights at any time.
items: Request to access personal information
Request to correct or delete personal information
Request to suspend processing of personal information
Request for account deletion (withdrawal)
sections.contact: The above rights can be exercised through the settings page within the service or by contacting contact@elnino.kr. The Company will take action without delay.

sections.title: Use of Cookies
sections.description: The Company uses cookies to provide optimized services to users.
items: Purpose of cookie collection: Maintaining login status, saving language settings, service usage analysis
How to refuse cookies: You can refuse cookies through browser settings, but some service features may be limited.

sections.title: International Transfer of Personal Information
sections.description: The Company may process users' personal information on servers located outside of Korea for service provision.
items: Purpose of transfer: Provision of real-time speech recognition and multilingual translation services
Items transferred: Voice data (immediately destroyed after real-time processing), translation text (immediately destroyed after real-time processing)
Recipients: AI service providers (speech recognition and translation processing), cloud infrastructure providers (server operation)
Retention and use period: Immediately destroyed after real-time processing (Data Zero Retention policy applied)

sections.title: Privacy Officer
sections.description: The Company has designated a Privacy Officer who oversees all matters related to personal information processing.
sections.notice: For reports or consultations regarding personal information breaches, you may contact the Personal Information Infringement Report Center (privacy.kisa.or.kr), the Supreme Prosecutors' Office Cyber Investigation Division (spo.go.kr), or the National Police Agency Cyber Bureau (cyberbureau.police.go.kr).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.effectiveNotice: These Terms of Service are effective from March 14, 2026.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: These Terms of Service (hereinafter 'Terms') aim to define the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between Elnino (hereinafter 'the Company') and users regarding the use of the AI real-time translation service "Knoc" (hereinafter 'the Service') provided by the Company.

sections.title: Definitions
sections.description: The definitions of terms used in these Terms are as follows.

definitions.definition: Refers to the AI-based real-time translation service (Knoc) provided by the Company, including real-time subtitle translation, multilingual support, and other features accessible through web browsers.
Refers to a person who has agreed to these Terms, completed registration, and uses the Service.
Refers to prepaid usage vouchers purchased for service use under the Pay As You Go plan. Credits are deducted based on service usage time.
Refers to a method of using the service through monthly recurring payments under the Custom plan.
Refers to a virtual space where real-time translation takes place, serving as a unit where speakers and participants join together.

sections.title: Effect and Amendment of Terms
items: These Terms take effect by being posted on the service screen or notified to users through other means.
The Company may amend these Terms within the scope that does not violate applicable laws, and will notify users within the service at least 7 days before the effective date of any changes.
Members who do not agree to the amended Terms may discontinue use and withdraw from the service.

sections.title: Service Description
sections.description: The services provided by the Company are as follows.
items: AI-based real-time speech-to-text translation service
Automatic recognition and translation support for 101 languages
Industry-specific terminology boosting models
Usage management through dashboard
Other services developed or provided through partnerships by the Company

sections.title: Service Agreement
items: The service agreement is established when a person wishing to register agrees to these Terms, fills in member information as prescribed by the Company, submits a registration application, and the Company approves it.

The Service is available only to users aged 14 or older. If a child under 14 wishes to use the Service, the consent of a legal guardian is required. The Company does not collect personal information of children under 14 without the consent of a legal guardian.

The Company may reject a registration application or terminate the agreement afterwards in the following cases: when another person's information is used, when false information is provided, when eligibility was previously restricted due to Terms violations, or when a person under 14 has not obtained the consent of a legal guardian.

sections.title: Fees and Payment
sections.description: Matters regarding service plans and payment are as follows.
items: Pay As You Go: A prepaid credit system. Credits are deducted based on service usage time, and service is suspended when credits are exhausted.
Custom (Subscription): A monthly subscription providing agreed-upon usage hours and features. Additional usage hours purchased during the subscription period expire at the end of the subscription.
Usage hours from Pay As You Go and subscription plans cannot be combined or transferred between each other.

All payments are processed through Paddle.com, which acts as the Merchant of Record for all orders. Paddle handles all payment processing, customer service inquiries related to payments, and refund processing.
All purchases are backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee. Please refer to the Refund Policy for full details on refund eligibility and procedures.
Custom (Subscription) plans are available in 1-month, 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month terms. The contract period is determined through consultation.

Custom (Subscription) plan conditions (number of concurrent rooms, participants per room, usage hours, etc.) can only be changed at subscription renewal. Conditions cannot be modified during the subscription period.

sections.title: Service Restriction and Suspension
items: The Company may restrict or suspend service in the following cases: unavoidable circumstances due to service facility maintenance, when a member disrupts normal service operation, or force majeure events such as natural disasters or national emergencies.
The Company will provide prior notice of service restriction or suspension, and may provide post-notification in unavoidable circumstances.

sections.title: Member Obligations
items: Members must comply with these Terms, the Company's notices, service usage guidelines, and other announcements.
Members must not infringe on others' personal information or use the service fraudulently.
Members may not use the service for commercial resale or relay purposes.
Members are responsible for safely managing their account credentials (ID, password) and may not transfer or share them with third parties.

sections.title: Intellectual Property Rights
items: Copyright and intellectual property rights related to the Service belong to the Company.
Members may not reproduce, transmit, publish, distribute, broadcast, or provide to third parties any information obtained through the service without prior approval from the Company.
Rights to translation output processed through the Service belong to the rights holder of the original content.

sections.title: Disclaimer
items: Due to the nature of AI-based translation services, the Company does not guarantee complete accuracy of translations. Users are responsible for how they utilize translation results.
The Company is not liable when service cannot be provided due to force majeure events such as natural disasters, war, or service suspension by telecommunications providers.
The Company is not liable for service disruptions caused by circumstances attributable to the member.

sections.title: Termination
items: Members may request termination (withdrawal) at any time through service settings or customer support.
The Company may terminate the agreement after prior notice if a member violates these Terms, and may terminate immediately in urgent cases.
Upon termination, remaining credits or subscription period are subject to the Refund Policy. Refund requests within the 30-day money-back guarantee period will be honored.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
items: Disputes related to these Terms shall be interpreted and governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea.
For disputes arising between the Company and members regarding service use, the Seoul Central District Court shall have jurisdiction.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.effectiveNotice: This Refund Policy is effective from March 14, 2026.

sections.title: General Principles
sections.content: Payments and refunds for the AI real-time translation service "Knoc" provided by Elnino (hereinafter 'the Company') are subject to the conditions below. All payments are processed through Paddle.com, which acts as the Merchant of Record for all orders. Members are advised to fully review the service details, plan terms, and this Refund Policy before making any payment.

sections.title: 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.description: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all purchases. The following conditions apply.
items: If you are not satisfied with the service for any reason, you may request a full refund within 30 days of the original purchase date.
To request a refund, please contact us at contact@elnino.kr with your order details.

Refund requests are processed through Paddle, our Merchant of Record. Paddle may also process refund requests made directly to Paddle within 14 days of the transaction date or the last subscription renewal date.
After the 30-day money-back guarantee period has elapsed, refunds are not available except as described in the Exceptions section below.

sections.title: Right of Withdrawal
sections.description: In accordance with the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce (for Korean consumers), withdrawal is additionally permitted under the following conditions.
items: If the service has not been used at all after purchasing credits (Pay As You Go), a withdrawal request may be made within 7 days of payment for a full refund.
If the service has not been used at all after purchasing a subscription (Custom), a withdrawal request may be made within 7 days of payment for a full refund.
These rights are in addition to, and do not limit, the 30-day money-back guarantee described above.

sections.title: Pay As You Go
sections.description: The payment and refund terms for the Pay As You Go plan are as follows.
items: Credits are purchased on a prepaid basis. Refund requests within the 30-day money-back guarantee period will be honored.
Credits are deducted based on service usage time. After the 30-day guarantee period, unused credits are not eligible for refund.
Pay As You Go credits and Custom subscription usage hours cannot be combined or transferred between each other.

sections.title: Custom (Subscription)
sections.description: The payment and refund terms for the subscription plan are as follows.
items: Refund requests within the 30-day money-back guarantee period from the initial purchase or latest renewal will be honored.
After the 30-day guarantee period, monthly subscription fees are non-refundable.
Additional usage hours purchased during the subscription period expire at the end of the subscription.
Upon cancellation, the service remains available until the end of the current billing cycle.
Custom subscription usage hours and Pay As You Go credits do not interfere with or combine with each other.

sections.title: Exceptions
sections.description: The Company may consider separate compensation in the following cases only.
items: If service is disrupted for an extended period (24 consecutive hours or more) due to circumstances attributable to the Company, compensation in usage time for the affected period will be considered.
If duplicate charges due to payment system errors are confirmed, the duplicate payment will be refunded.
Even in the above exceptional cases, compensation may be provided as credits or usage time rather than monetary refunds.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: Inquiries regarding refunds and payments can be submitted through the contact information below.
sections.notice: We will respond within 3 business days after receiving your inquiry. Refund requests may also be submitted directly to Paddle.com. If a refund or payment dispute is not resolved, you may file a mediation request with the Korea Consumer Agency (www.kca.go.kr, 1372) or the Electronic Commerce Mediation Committee (www.ecmc.or.kr).
